infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BuzzAlert needs your location to show safety alerts and risk zones near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: BuzzAlert needs background location for Virtual Escort safety monitoring.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: BuzzAlert needs camera access to take photos when reporting incidents.
